channel.title: Intellij on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Intellij on Arrans github.io

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Continue is the leading open-source AI code assistant. You can connect any models and any context to build custom autocomplete and chat experiences inside VS Code and JetBrains

item.title: mmk2410/intellij-idea-community
item.description: Unofficial .deb packages of IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition. This is a mirror of

item.title: casteng/i-pascal
item.description: A free Object Pascal language plugin for IntelliJ IDEA
